attacking_style: Launches aggressive moves at distance (60km out), typically from breakaways on hilly terrain. Prefers long-range efforts over explosive late attacks, showing sustainable threshold over punch.
team_tactics: Operates as breakaway specialist and KOM hunter rather than protected rider. Receives team orders to sacrifice personal objectives (KOM jersey) for domestique duties. Limited effectiveness as leadout rider on flat/hilly stages.
terrain_preference: Hilly classics and breakaway-friendly stages suit best. Sustainable threshold allows recovery from mid-climb drops. Struggles on explosive climbing finishes and lacks firepower for organized sprints.
vulnerability: Lacks explosive power to hold off organized leadouts or sustain late solo attacks. Poor climbing acceleration causes drops on steeper gradients. Leadout positioning skills inadequate for flat sprint stages.
key_patterns: Breaks away early (60km+) relying on threshold over explosiveness (3 observations)
Struggles with explosive efforts: dropped on climbs but recovers via sustained power (2 observations)
Prioritizes KOM/stage hunting from breakaways over GC or sprint outcomes (3 observations)
Shows form improvement late in stage races rather than early dominance (2 observations)
Failed leadout/positioning duties when assigned support roles (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Mixed signals with 2023 showing leadout weakness but consistent breakaway presence 2020-2022. No clear improvement or decline pattern.
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 19
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 19
